description: Polars-native data manipulation. Ops mode chains verbs (select / filter / with_columns / sort / group_by / join / distinct / rename / drop / slice / head / tail) against a named set of CSV / Parquet / SAV inputs; query mode runs SQL via polars_sql::SQLContext over the same inputs. Per-input pre-pipelines, SQL-flavoured expressions (polars-sql), and CSV / Parquet outputs.
